title: Neutral Catalog Plugin Source Schema
description: Schema for catalog/plugins/<name>.json — shared plugin metadata, per-target enablement, and target-specific overrides that scripts/lib/generate/emit-claude.js and emit-codex.js read to build the generated Claude and Codex artifacts. Does not re-validate the full internal shape of pass-through Claude component fields (outputStyles, mcpServers, hooks, userConfig, dependencies) — schemas/plugin.schema.json already validates those exhaustively on the generated .claude-plugin/plugin.json output; this schema only guards the catalog-specific fields (marketplace, targets) that have no downstream re-check.
$comment: Repo-derived schema, not an official Anthropic or OpenAI schema. The targets.codex override block (interface, description, skillAllowlist, componentPaths) is derived from the July 2026 Codex plugin contract recorded in docs/research/2026-07-16-codex-plugin-contract-spike.md; no plugin populates it yet (all 17 sources carry targets.codex.enabled: false as of this PR) — fields are validated unconditionally so a later shell's override cannot reach a generated manifest silently malformed.

outputStyles.description: Pass-through Claude component field; see schemas/plugin.schema.json for its full shape.

mcpServers.description: Pass-through Claude component field; see schemas/plugin.schema.json for its full shape.

hooks.description: Pass-through Claude component field; see schemas/plugin.schema.json for its full shape.

userConfig.description: Pass-through Claude component field; see schemas/plugin.schema.json for its full shape.

dependencies.description: Pass-through Claude component field; see schemas/plugin.schema.json for its full shape.

description.description: Overrides the top-level description in the generated marketplace entry when present.

claude.description: Claude-target enablement. Unlike targets.codex, this stays a bare boolean — the Claude emitter carries no per-plugin overrides.

interface.description: Required once targets.codex.enabled is true (buildCodexPluginManifest dereferences both fields unconditionally); optional while enabled is false.

description.description: Overrides the top-level description in the generated Codex manifest when present.

skillAllowlist.description: Skill directory names under skills/ that buildCodexSkillTree copies into plugins/<name>/codex/skills/. Skills not listed here are excluded from the Codex distribution (R7).

skills.description: Manifest-relative path the generated Codex plugin manifest declares for its skill tree (R7: 'an explicit manifest-relative choice, not an assumed convention').
